tagline: AI-Powered Chronic Care Intelligence — Continuous, Measurable, Actionable

challenge.headline: Risk Compounds Silently Between Clinic Visits
challenge.description: 96% of a patient's health journey happens outside the clinic, yet traditional care models only capture the 4% that occurs in-office. Healthcare organizations managing chronic care programs lack a unified view of patient status, making it nearly impossible to prioritize interventions before conditions escalate.

result.headline: Decision-Ready Intelligence Delivered at Scale

stats.label: of care happens between visits — now monitored
Unified view across patients, clinicians & payers

result.quote: By bringing patient engagement, care coordination, and health insights together within a single platform, ONEai Health helps healthcare organizations deliver a more connected and proactive care experience.
